message:
fix(ci): resolve clippy and compilation errors

- Remove unused import `Event` in runtime.rs
- Prefix unused variable `event_bus` with underscore
- Fix unnecessary raw string literal hashes in storage.rs
- Use bool-to-int conversion via From trait instead of if-else
- Fix PaneInfo field access (title is Option<String>, use effective_domain())
- Use direct field access for db_path and lock_path instead of missing methods
- Add #[must_use] attributes for clippy compliance
- Use Self instead of type name in impl blocks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
